notes: Paramparā is correctly preserved. The engineering analog does not conflate paramparā with mere oral tradition or with mentorship — the verse's transmission has named links and a content (the imperishable yoga). The analog preserves both: named links (Stripe / PayPal / MasterCard) and content (idempotency-key discipline). The traditions Shankara and Ramanuja both emphasize lineage; their summaries are accurately rendered in the source pack. PASS.
